sgTip: Prioritize NulBlaze and NulShock for Yuna — they trivialise the upcoming Sinspawn fights.

subLocations.name: S.S. Liki
subLocations.prose: Head below deck first — find O'aka in the hall and start your donations toward the 1,001 Gil total. In the southeast corner of the power room, Al Bhed Primer Vol. III is half-hidden on the floor; look for the corner sticking out. In the cabin to the west, kick the luggage — if you have fewer than 20 Potions it yields one each kick, up to 20 total. A Remedy is also down here. On deck before the boss, Sin's Fin attacks first: only Wakka, Lulu, and Auron can reach it, so let them focus the fin while Tidus or Kimahri handles the Sinscales.

bosses.strategy: Sin's Fin appears on deck first. Focus attacks on it — no special mechanics. HP: 2,000.

Drain Touch is nasty — keep HP above 200. Have Yuna heal each round. Sin's Fin may return; deal with Echuilles first to end the fight. NulBlaze/NulShock from Yuna blocks the elemental damage. HP: 2,000.
